component.name: Pinba Engine
component.summary: Real-time statistics storage engine for MySQL and MariaDB

description.p: Pinba is a storage engine for MySQL and MariaDB that collects and processes application runtime statistics sent over UDP by Pinba clients, most commonly the Pinba PHP extension. It provides real-time, per-request performance monitoring and profiling, queried through ordinary SQL, without any additional infrastructure.
This fork modernises Pinba for current database servers — adding support for MySQL 8.0 and 8.4 and building against MariaDB — continuing the original project by Antony Dovgal.
